changelog: Skipping ahead no longer stops the channel: the schedule keeps following item to item even when episodes are finished early. The follow-up now also starts precisely at the credits using Jellyfin's Media Segments (outro) when available, falling back to a short margin before the end otherwise, so the tail credits are skipped.
description: Lightweight virtual TV channels: deterministic schedules over your own library, tuned in via normal direct playback at the live position. No transcoding, no tuner emulation.
name: LiteTV Channels
overview: TV channels from your library, without transcoding.
